title: Custom Android Manifest File in Unity
summary: This particular xml is an example of custom Android Manifest file which can be used in unity. For further explaination on how this works, please read the article Custom Android Manifest File in Unity .
content:
This particular xml is an example of custom Android Manifest file which can be used in unity.

For further explaination on how this works, please read the article Custom Android Manifest File in Unity.
